title: Verify TUI launch blocks honestly without visible evidence
prompt: Run the real TUI launch QA phase in a missing-computer-use scenario and verify that it does not claim PASS without visible TUI evidence.

args: const fs=require('node:fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.superliora/evidence/liora-agent-bench/system-suite/tui-launch-missing-computer-use/manifest.json','utf8')); const summary=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.superliora/evidence/liora-agent-bench/system-suite/tui-launch-missing-computer-use/tui/summary.json','utf8')); if (manifest.status !== 'blocked') throw new Error(`manifest status ${manifest.status}`); if (summary.status !== 'BLOCKED') throw new Error(`tui summary status ${summary.status}`); if (!String(summary.reason).includes('computer-use')) throw new Error('blocked reason does not mention computer-use');
